summary: Phase B & C (Notary Professional Features + GDPR/Compliance Tools) testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working: Notary Journal (create, list, search, stats), Digital Seal (upload, activate, delete, file access), Commission tracking, and GDPR (privacy settings, data export, deletion request/cancel). Frontend pages verified: NotaryJournal.jsx, DigitalSeal.jsx, CompliancePage.jsx. Navigation links confirmed: Dashboard Privacy button→/compliance, NotaryDashboard Quick Actions→/notary/journal and /notary/seal.

issues: Console hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> and <option> - minor React rendering issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Good: All Notary Professional endpoints properly use get_current_user dependency
Good: Journal entries auto-increment entry_number per notary
Good: Seal upload validates file type (PNG, JPG, SVG only) and size (2MB max)
Good: New seal upload automatically deactivates previous active seal
Good: GDPR export includes all user data with proper datetime serialization
Good: Deletion request requires password confirmation and has 30-day grace period
Good: All frontend pages have data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Privacy toggles save immediately to backend
Minor: NotaryJournal.jsx has React hydration warnings for table elements (cosmetic only)
seed_data_creation: Created journal entry TEST_API_Document for admin user via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B & C fully tested. 1) Notary Journal: /notary/journal shows stats (total entries, this month, total fees, doc types), search, add entry modal, paginated table. 2) Digital Seal: /notary/seal shows active seal, upload area (PNG/JPG/SVG, 2MB max), all seals grid with activate/delete buttons. 3) Compliance: /compliance has privacy toggles (analytics, marketing, data sharing, activity visible), data export button (downloads JSON), and account deletion with password confirmation and cancel. 4) Dashboard has Privacy button linking to /compliance. 5) NotaryDashboard Quick Actions has Notary Journal and Digital Seal links. 6) All GDPR endpoints working: GET/PUT /api/gdpr/privacy, POST /api/gdpr/export, POST /api/gdpr/deletion-request, POST /api/gdpr/deletion-request/cancel, GET /api/gdpr/deletion-request/status. 7) All Notary endpoints working: GET/POST /api/notary/professional/journal, GET /api/notary/professional/journal/stats, GET/POST/DELETE /api/notary/professional/seals. Note: Rate limiting on login (10/min) - use session-scoped fixtures for pytest.

notary_journal.GET /api/notary/professional/journal: WORKING - Returns paginated entries with search
notary_journal.GET /api/notary/professional/journal/sta: WORKING - Returns total_entries, this_month, total_fees, by_document_type
notary_journal.POST /api/notary/professional/journal: WORKING - Creates entry with auto-incrementing entry_number
notary_journal.frontend_page: WORKING - /notary/journal displays stats, search, table, add modal

digital_seal.POST /api/notary/professional/seals/uplo: WORKING - Uploads seal and sets as active
digital_seal.GET /api/notary/professional/seals/{id}/: WORKING - Serves image file with correct Content-Type
digital_seal.frontend_page: WORKING - /notary/seal displays active seal, upload area, all seals grid

gdpr_export.POST /api/gdpr/export: WORKING - Returns JSON with all user data, Content-Disposition header

gdpr_deletion.frontend_flow: WORKING - Password confirmation, banner shown, cancel works

notary_commission.GET /api/notary/professional/commission: WORKING - Returns license_number, state, expiry, days_remaining
